title: OFAC SDN list match on pending wire transfer
description: Customer matches OFAC SDN entry with 100% name and country match. Wire transfer of USD 250,000 to same-named entity pending approval.

triage_kwargs.title: OFAC SDN match on pending wire transfer
triage_kwargs.description: Customer matches OFAC SDN entry. 100% name and country confidence. Wire transfer USD 250,000 pending.

reason: Direct OFAC SDN match is a regulatory breach requiring immediate escalation

title: Confirmed structuring pattern with SAR obligation triggered
description: Customer made 14 cash deposits between USD 4,200 and USD 4,900 over 8 days. Consistent below-CTR-threshold pattern. FATF-TYP-01 structuring confirmed. SAR filing obligation triggered.

triage_kwargs.title: Confirmed structuring pattern with SAR obligation
triage_kwargs.description: Customer made 14 cash deposits between USD 4,200-4,900 over 8 days. Consistent below-CTR-threshold pattern. SAR obligation triggered.

reason: Confirmed structuring pattern with SAR obligation and strong evidence requires escalation

title: Shell company round-tripping via three offshore jurisdictions
description: Funds transferred from account through three shell companies in BVI, Cayman, and Liechtenstein back to originating beneficial owner. FATF-TYP-02 and FATF-TYP-03 confirmed. Beneficial ownership obscured.

triage_kwargs.title: Shell company round-tripping via offshore jurisdictions
triage_kwargs.description: Funds traced through three shell entities in BVI, Cayman, Liechtenstein back to originating beneficial owner. UBO obscured.

reason: Confirmed layering via shell companies with high-risk jurisdictions and SDN-equivalent risk profile

title: PEP high-value wire transfer with adverse media
description: Customer is a senior government minister (PEP tier 1). Transfer of EUR 800,000 to real estate entity. Adverse media screening shows recent financial investigation coverage.

triage_kwargs.title: PEP high-value transfer with adverse media
triage_kwargs.description: PEP tier 1 customer. Wire transfer EUR 800,000 to real estate entity. Recent adverse media: financial investigation coverage.

reason: PEP with adverse media and high-value real estate transfer has strong evidence for report preparation

title: Trade-based money laundering: over-invoiced machinery import
description: Customer imports industrial machinery consistently invoiced at 3-4x fair market value from supplier in high-risk jurisdiction. Pattern matches FATF-TYP-04 trade-based ML typology.

triage_kwargs.title: Over-invoiced machinery import matching TBML typology
triage_kwargs.description: Industrial machinery consistently invoiced at 3-4x market value. Supplier in high-risk jurisdiction. Pattern matches FATF TBML typology.

reason: Confirmed TBML pattern with strong evidence matches report-ready threshold

title: 250x velocity increase with high-risk jurisdiction transfers
description: Account shows 250x increase in outbound wire volume over 5 days, all to banks in FATF grey-listed jurisdictions. No business explanation. AMLD-RI-03 and AMLD-RI-04 indicators.

triage_kwargs.title: 250x velocity anomaly with high-risk jurisdiction wires
triage_kwargs.description: Account shows 250x outbound wire volume increase over 5 days. All to FATF grey-listed jurisdictions. No business explanation provided.

reason: Combined velocity and jurisdiction indicators provide strong evidence for SAR preparation

title: Correspondent bank with adverse media and weak AML controls
description: Respondent bank flagged in FATF grey-list jurisdiction. Recent adverse media coverage of regulatory sanctions for AML failings. AMLD-RI-08 correspondent banking due diligence required.

triage_kwargs.title: Correspondent bank with adverse media and weak AML controls
triage_kwargs.description: Respondent bank in FATF grey-listed jurisdiction with adverse media coverage of AML regulatory sanctions.

reason: Risk indicators present but evidence not yet sufficient for autonomous report preparation

title: Distant PEP relative: unclear screening outcome
description: Customer identified as second-degree relative of a mid-level government official in an EU member state. AMLD-RI-01 applies. No adverse media. Standard transaction pattern.

triage_kwargs.title: Distant PEP relative with standard transaction profile
triage_kwargs.description: Customer identified as second-degree relative of mid-level EU government official. No adverse media. Standard transaction amounts.

reason: Distant PEP relative in low-risk context needs review but should not escalate automatically

title: Regular monthly payroll disbursement
description: Employer account with documented payroll mandate disburses regular monthly salary payments to 45 employees. Amounts consistent with employment contracts. Known recurring pattern.

triage_kwargs.title: Regular monthly payroll to employees
triage_kwargs.description: Documented payroll mandate. Regular monthly salary to 45 employees. Amounts match employment contracts. Fully explained recurring pattern.

reason: Documented routine payroll is a known normal business pattern

title: Crypto assets routed through known mixer address
description: Customer withdraws digital assets from exchange and routes through a known Tornado Cash successor address before converting to fiat. FATF-TYP-05 crypto mixing confirmed.

triage_kwargs.title: Crypto assets through known mixer before fiat conversion
triage_kwargs.description: Customer routes digital assets through a known mixer address before fiat conversion. Tornado Cash successor address confirmed.

reason: Confirmed crypto mixing typology with strong evidence supports SAR preparation
